bead.title: Stage 2.10: Subscription resolver — workerProgress (wire graphql-ws transport)
bead.description: Implement subscription resolver for workerProgress(workerID). Wire graphql-ws transport in server.go. New file cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_sub_worker.go. Wraps existing WorkerManager.SubscribeProgress. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 2 bead #23.
bead.acceptance: (1) Integration test opens real WebSocket client and receives real events. (2) MANUAL: open GraphiQL, start `subscription { workerProgress(workerID: \"<id>\") { phase eventID logLine } }`, then in another terminal start a worker via `ddx agent execute-loop`, see events stream in GraphiQL in real time. Record at least 3 events in the completion note.
